positive: A whimsical, stylized astronaut floating through a nebula filled with bioluminescent flora and celestial jellyfish. The astronaut is rendered in a sleek, minimalist chrome suit with glowing accent lines, casting dramatic shadows. The composition is centered, utilizing strong contrasting silhouettes of the astronaut against the vibrant, deep blues, purples, and teals of the nebula backdrop. Style: Graphic novel illustration meets retro-futurism, highly detailed, clean line art, high contrast, vector quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Lighting is ethereal and dramatic, emphasizing deep space void.
negative: low resolution, blurry, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, bad anatomy, ugly, deformed, artifacts, noise, extra limbs, poorly rendered, solid colors, realistic photo, photorealism
